title: PROJECT ORION v2.1 — Passive Tri-Axis Magnetometer Gradiometer System
entry: PROJECT ORION v2.1 — Passive Tri-Axis Magnetometer Gradiometer System for Underwater Explosive Ordnance Detection, Classification, and Geo-Marking. Full technical specification sealed. Author: Sheldon K. Salmon. Submitted to UNDP Affordable Tools challenge. CAPEX $4,650. March 10, 2026.
challenge: Affordable Tools to Find and Mark Underwater Explosive Ordnance
author: Sheldon K. Salmon
